violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Chips stored in walk-in cooler not properly closed for storage -Bread sticks stored in walk-in freezer not properly closed for storage

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, non absorbent and cleanable. -Spongy material for anti-slip above food prep area getting dirty. Suggest cleaning and using harder/non-absorbent material.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed basketed lined with food grade paper and black bowls stored on food line vertically.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors of walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer have build up. Need swept and cleaned. -Floor under/behind ice machine has build up and needs cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
